title: Convocation 2026 Collection is live
body: Limited-edition convocation tees and pen sets are now available. Convocation-week orders ship with priority handling.

title: Free shipping above ₹999
body: All orders above ₹999 now ship free across India. No coupon needed — applied automatically at checkout.

title: Sticker packs restocking soon
body: The Campus Sticker Pack sold out in 9 days. The next batch arrives mid-July; join the waitlist on the product page.

title: New: AI shopping assistant
body: Ask our new assistant to track orders, suggest gifts, or answer sizing questions — look for the chat bubble at the bottom right.
